plugins.photosPermission: RiskWise lets you select contract screenshots so you can confirm details before running an educational risk check.
plugins.cameraPermission: RiskWise lets you photograph contract screenshots so you can confirm details before running an educational risk check.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: RiskWise uses the camera only when you choose to capture a contract screenshot for educational risk review.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: RiskWise uses your photo library only when you choose a contract screenshot for educational risk review.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: RiskWise may save generated images only if you explicitly choose to export them.
